# Amplified Intelligence

> A Post-AI design and research lab building diagnostic tools for signal processing and edge intelligence.

## What we do

We build software for people who value truth over volume. In an era where language is cheap, we make tools that cut through the noise.

Our specialty: local-first AI tools that run on your hardware, not our servers.

## Products

### SlopWash
A native macOS utility that strips corporate jargon, AI slop, and vague language from any text.
- Highlight text, press ⌘⇧W, get the blunt truth
- Runs entirely on-device. No cloud, no telemetry
- One-time license, $14.99
- Available at: https://slopwash.me

## Philosophy

We believe intelligence is discernment, not just processing. The most valuable tool in the post-AI era is the one that knows when to say "no."

## Key facts

- Founded: 2024
- Focus: Signal processing, anti-noise architecture, edge intelligence
- Stack: Local-first, privacy-by-design, macOS-native
